final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce campaign.

Style/medium: needs a bold, commercial promotional aesthetic with artistic typography and layered type stacking — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typographic stacking with product/hero subject physically overlapping and occluding portions of the background text layers
Subject: must include a hero product or focal subject that breaks in front of the type layers
Scene/backdrop: needs a visually rich, complex backdrop — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, attention-grabbing direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve: (1) artistic display lettering as a design element, (2) typographic stacking / layered text depth, (3) product/subject overlapping text, (4) composition is complex but visually organized — not chaotic
Avoid: must avoid flat, sparse, or minimalist layouts; must avoid cluttered illegible chaos
